subject: Auth v2 cutover plan — draft
snippet: Hi Amelia — sharing the draft cutover plan for Friday...
body:
Hi Amelia,

Sharing the draft cutover plan for Friday. Highlights:
- Dual-write shim has been stable for 5 days
- Plan to flip the read path at 08:00 PT
- Rollback path: revert feature flag auth_v2_rollout=false

Let me know if you want changes before I send to the wider list.

Jonas

subject: Latency spike alert — auth.refresh
snippet: FYI alertmanager fired at 10:42 UTC for auth.refresh p95 > 600ms...
body:
FYI alertmanager fired at 10:42 UTC for auth.refresh p95 > 600ms. Auto-recovered at 10:51. Looking into whether it's related to the shim warmup.

Dashboard: https://grafana.cloudfront.net/d/auth-latency

— Helena

subject: Re: Auth v2 cutover plan — draft
snippet: Looks good. Two nits...
body:
Looks good. Two nits:
1. Add a step to drain the dual-writer queue before flip
2. Page the on-call before flipping the read path

Ready to send.

Amelia

subject: [ALERT] billing-api error rate above SLO
snippet: Error rate for billing-api over the last 5 minutes is 2.1%...
body:
PagerDuty alert ID: PD-XYZ-789

Error rate for billing-api over the last 5 minutes is 2.1%. SLO target 1%. Currently auto-paging the on-call.

Runbook: https://runbooks.cloudfront.net/billing-api-error-rate

subject: Exclusive opportunity for senior engineers
snippet: We came across your profile...
body:
Hi Amelia,

We came across your profile and would love to chat about an exciting opportunity at our stealth-mode startup...

Best,
The TalentBot

Sarah
